recommendations.title: Fastlife

recommendations.title: Respect
recommendations.overview: The rise of Aretha Franklin’s career from a child singing in her father’s church’s choir to her international superstardom.

recommendations.title: Across the Universe
recommendations.overview: When young dockworker Jude leaves Liverpool to find his estranged father in the United States, he is swept up by the waves of change that are re-shaping the nation. Jude falls in love with Lucy, who joins the growing anti-war movement. As the body co

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: Detroit
recommendations.overview: A police raid in Detroit in 1967 results in one of the largest citizens' uprisings in the history of the United States.

recommendations.title: Brooklyn
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Ireland and New York, young Eilis Lacey has to choose between two men and two countries.

recommendations.title: Lawless
recommendations.overview: In 1931, the Bondurant brothers of Franklin County, Virginia, run a multipurpose backwoods establishment that hides their true business — bootlegging. Middle brother Forrest is the brain of the operation; older Howard is the brawn, and younger Jack,

recommendations.title: American Animals
recommendations.overview: Lexington, Kentucky, 2004. Four young men attempt to execute one of the most audacious art heists in the history of the United States.

recommendations.title: The Duchess
recommendations.overview: A chronicle of the life of 18th century aristocrat Georgiana, Duchess of Devonshire, who was reviled for her extravagant political and personal life.

recommendations.title: My Days of Mercy
recommendations.overview: The daughter of a man on death row falls in love with a woman on the opposing side of her family's political cause.
